action_choice_hints: The action cell is adjacent to a cell with a special directional marker.
The action cell is aligned in the same row or column as a target object.
The action cell is not blocked by an obstacle in the direction of intended movement.
The action cell extends an existing contiguous structure of a particular role.
The action cell is adjacent to a previously selected action cell.
The action cell is on a path that connects two or more important objects.
feature_family_hints: Adjacency relations: Needed to determine if the action cell is next to key objects or structures.
Alignment features: Required to capture whether the action cell shares a row or column with important objects.
Contiguity/extension features: To model whether the action cell continues an existing structure.
Path connectivity: To assess if the action cell helps form a connection between multiple objects.
Obstacle-aware features: To ensure the action cell is not blocked in the intended direction.
